title: Ensure clusters are created with Private Nodes

input_row.title: Ensure clusters are created with Private Nodes
input_row.description: Disable public IP addresses for cluster nodes, so that they only have private IP addresses. Private Nodes are nodes with no public IP addresses.
input_row.rationale: Disabling public IP addresses on cluster nodes restricts access to only internal networks, forcing attackers to obtain local network access before attempting to compromise the underlying Kubernetes hosts.
input_row.audit: Check for the following: export OKE_NODEPOOLID= export OKE_NODEID= oci ce node-pool get --node-pool-id ${OKE_NODEPOOLID=} --node-id ${OKE_NODEID=} [--query ] [--auth ] [--profile ] [--region ]
input_row.remediation: Default Value: By default, Private Nodes are disabled. Internal Only - General
input_row.impact: To enable Private Nodes, the cluster has to also be configured with a private master IP range and IP Aliasing enabled. Private Nodes do not have outbound access to the public internet. If you want to provide outbound Internet access for your private nodes, you can use Cloud NAT or you can manage your own NAT gateway.
input_row.default_value: By default, Private Nodes are disabled. Internal Only - General

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**PROGRAM NAME:** oci_container_engine_cluster_private_nodes_enabled

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
- Use the OCI CLI command `oci ce node-pool get --node-pool-id ${OKE_NODEPOOLID} --node-id ${OKE_NODEID}` to fetch the node pool details.
- The command should confirm that the node pool configuration has `is_private` set to `true`, indicating that the nodes are private and have no public IP addresses.
- Enumerate all node pools and associated nodes for each cluster by invoking the following:
  1. Get all node pools in a specified cluster: `oci ce node-pool list --compartment-id <COMPARTMENT_ID> --cluster-id <CLUSTER_ID>`
  2. For each node pool identified, check the nodes by using the command: `oci ce node-pool get --node-pool-id <NODE_POOL_ID>`
- The expected configuration should have the property `is_private` set to `true`, ensuring that nodes do not have public IP addresses.
- Pass/Fail criteria:
  - Pass: Nodes are configured with `is_private` as `true`.
  - Fail: Nodes are configured with `is_private` as `false`, indicating public IP addresses are assigned.
